about: Committed cache of one drafted filing per model per incident over tests/fixtures/materiality_corpus.json, recorded so scripts/model_leaderboard.py re-runs KEYLESS. The SCORING (the grounding oracle, the rate tally, the intervals) is always real and keyless; only this raw filing text is cached. Each model carries a 'source' of 'live' (real model output) or 'illustrative' (a labeled plausible draft used only when a live call was unavailable). All 5 models are honestly-labeled illustrative filings because no live provider was reachable at record time (the Featherless concurrency slot was held and the AI/ML API gateway was unavailable); every model's 'source' field reads 'illustrative'. To refresh against live models run py scripts/model_leaderboard.py --record (needs FEATHERLESS_API_KEY and AIML_API_KEY).

filings.mat-clear-mass-breach: On 16 June 2026, Meridian Trust Bank N.V. detected a cybersecurity incident attributed to LockBit 3.0 affecting core banking ledger and customer KYC store [field: incident_start_utc]. Approximately 2,100,000 records were affected [field: records_affected]. The incident is partially contained [field: containment]. This notification is filed under the NIS2 mandatory breach-notification timeline, and the entity is coordinating with the relevant competent authority. Further forensic detail will follow as the investigation proceeds.
filings.mat-clear-core-outage: On 2 May 2026, Atlas Securities LLC detected a cybersecurity incident attributed to unattributed DDoS affecting retail trading platform and order matching engine [field: incident_start_utc]. Approximately 1,200 records were affected [field: records_affected]. The incident is contained [field: containment]. This notification is filed under the NIS2 mandatory breach-notification timeline, and the entity is coordinating with the relevant competent authority. Further forensic detail will follow as the investigation proceeds.
filings.mat-clear-regulated-data: On 11 March 2026, Northwind Health Holdings Inc. detected a cybersecurity incident attributed to BlackCat affecting claims processing and member portal [field: incident_start_utc]. Approximately 310,000 records were affected [field: records_affected]. The incident is contained [field: containment]. This notification is filed under the NIS2 mandatory breach-notification timeline, and the entity is coordinating with the relevant competent authority. Further forensic detail will follow as the investigation proceeds.
filings.mat-clear-financial-fraud: On 22 January 2026, Cascade Industrial Corp. detected a cybersecurity incident attributed to BEC actor (unnamed) affecting treasury workstation and payment initiation gateway [field: incident_start_utc]. No customer records were exfiltrated in this incident. The incident is contained [field: containment]. This notification is filed under the NIS2 mandatory breach-notification timeline, and the entity is coordinating with the relevant competent authority. Further forensic detail will follow as the investigation proceeds.
filings.mat-immaterial-phish-contained: On 9 April 2026, Cascade Industrial Corp. detected a cybersecurity incident attributed to commodity phishing kit affecting one employee mailbox [field: incident_start_utc]. No customer records were exfiltrated in this incident. The incident is contained [field: containment]. This notification is filed under the NIS2 mandatory breach-notification timeline, and the entity is coordinating with the relevant competent authority. Further forensic detail will follow as the investigation proceeds.
filings.mat-immaterial-test-system: On 18 February 2026, Atlas Securities LLC detected a cybersecurity incident attributed to automated scanner affecting staging sandbox (synthetic data only) [field: incident_start_utc]. No customer records were exfiltrated in this incident. The incident is contained [field: containment]. This notification is filed under the NIS2 mandatory breach-notification timeline, and the entity is coordinating with the relevant competent authority. Further forensic detail will follow as the investigation proceeds.
filings.mat-immaterial-tiny-nonsensitive: On 1 June 2026, Northwind Health Holdings Inc. detected a cybersecurity incident attributed to none (misconfiguration) affecting marketing newsletter form [field: incident_start_utc]. Approximately 40 records were affected [field: records_affected]. The incident is contained [field: containment]. This notification is filed under the NIS2 mandatory breach-notification timeline, and the entity is coordinating with the relevant competent authority. Further forensic detail will follow as the investigation proceeds.
filings.mat-immaterial-blocked-attempt: On 27 May 2026, Meridian Trust Bank N.V. detected a cybersecurity incident attributed to credential-stuffing botnet affecting customer login (WAF blocked) [field: incident_start_utc]. No customer records were exfiltrated in this incident. The incident is contained [field: containment]. This notification is filed under the NIS2 mandatory breach-notification timeline, and the entity is coordinating with the relevant competent authority. Further forensic detail will follow as the investigation proceeds.

This notification is filed under the NIS2 mandatory breach-notification timeline, and the entity is coordinating with the relevant competent authority.
